prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document applies to Scotland as it refers directly to the Scottish Government's involvement in processing applications under the Dangerous Dogs Act and specifies regulations relevant to Scotland. The Index of Exempted Dogs operates under legislation that encompasses all UK nations, including Scotland.
